violations.description: Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 140F to 70F or below within two hours. Large container of sauce in walk in cooler not cooled properly. Re-heat to 165 degrees F and cool in smaller containers.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Date marking of food items not accomplished.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Particle board shelving in multiple areas of facility showing wear/damage and no longer maintained sealed or in sound condition.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in prep table cooler on cook line needs cleaning. Walk in cooler shelving, floor, and walls need cleaning.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine not maintaining proper sanitizing concentrations. Service machine as needed.
Toilet facilities. — --Employee toilet room was not provided with a self closing door. Mechanism not connected at time of inspection. Door open.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have an over abundance of grease and food debris under/around line cooking equipment.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling tiles and supports missing/damaged near West delivery door.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. West delivery door not provided with self closing mechanism.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided, maintained (3 pts deducted)
